SV FIRE: +3 SV COLD: +3

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

AC: 8

[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Barnacle Breastplate

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Erudin


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Another item that breaks the rules
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2021 at 8:53 AM Rating: Default
animekenji
1,123 posts
How is piece of plate armor Shaman usable? It's like the devs forgot about their own rules when they designed many of the items in the game, and this is one of them. At least they remembered Iksar aren't supposed to be able to wear plate with this one. There are many plate armor pieces in the game that are Iksar usable, which isn't supposed to be.

Edited, Feb 7th 2021 9:53am by animekenji

If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?

where the shark is??
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 9:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775650502
2 posts
i can't find the freakin shark its crazy.
▲ Page top
RE: where the shark is??
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2004 at 8:16 PM Rating: Good
Kyrros
Sage
164 posts
The diseased shark is in Erudin harbor, on the same spawn tables as the rest of the roaming fish, pirahnas, and sharks (not the three stationary sharks, those are guarding Pearls of Odus)... just keep killing until it pops, I've killed it more than once, so its not that rare... good exp until about level 18.
____________________________
Kyrros <Knights Of Insomnia> - Bristlebane
Guild Leader and Guild Historian
Human Veteran Ranger and Warder of Tunare for 70 80 85 90 seasons
Knights of Insomnia Homepage - Hosted by Guildportal.com
http://www.guildportal.com/Guild.aspx?GuildID=2542&TabID=16569
▲ Page top
I still like it
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2002 at 2:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761483436
10 posts
Well, as far as I know there's no level cap on this quest, although you have to be amiable to them.

Keep in mind there are two Paladin/Cleric guilds in Erudin, the first one near the fountain, and the second one is near the Library. The second is the one giving out this quest. It is quite easy to get an amiable rating with them. (It is NOT easy to get the other Pal/Clr guild to like you, however).

Firstly you can go to the Warren's and hunt kobolds for molars. Since thet trivial loot code is gone, it won't be long before you have 20 or so molars. Go back to Erudin and hand the molars in to Tiam Khonsir in the Paladin/Cleric guild next to the Library. He's in the back garden. He will praise you and give you a little gold and sometimes bits of ringmail. The important thing is that he'll start liking you.

Keep doing this till he cons amiable, (which won't take long, i've handed in 50 molars but he was amiable before that...) and then you should be able to do the barnacle breastplate quest. I think the person giving out the quest is in the room behind the merchants in the guild, although I forget. Just hail everyone in there and ask around. Then follow the instructions to do the quest.

I like the armor. It's easy to get, and it looks cool. It's not fantastic (maybe it needs some boosts to it), but I like it regardless. Also you can sell it, or you can make some newbie happy by giving them this, and believe me, an untwinked newbie will love you forever if you give them weapons and armor. It's really hard to buy anything good between levels 1-5 because you only get like 9cp off the mobs at that level. If you do it a few times you could be a good samaritan and hand them out, rather than selling it for 10-30pp.

No it's not fantastic, but it does look cool, and it is worthwhile for the lower levels. They should probably give it better AC and some more stat boosts; or at least make it easier to get, but I still like it.

Lesell
▲ Page top
doin the quest/reaping the rewards
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2001 at 7:43 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251246757
Scholar
51 posts
My shammy, bout lvl 14ish (man thats been ages ago now) did this quest for several reasons. One, I was praticing my shark killing before I had to go up against anything trully huge. I mean there are some pretty big sharks out there and while you wait on your diseased shark you get the chance to kill other slightly larger sharks who come right to you in a pretty safe place. Also, they look really cool on people, so I was doing the quest, taking the bp back and selling them for cheap to anyone who wanted them in my homeland of halas and they looked alot nicer than the leather armor the lowbees normally wear. I'll admit its not a great breast plate, but it definately added something to do while in eruden and I actually got pretty good exp off the sharks while I waited for the one I wanted.

thats my observation... use it how you like. It's worth questing if you can get exp off the sharks while you wait on the diseased.

▲ Page top
This is a nice peace of armor
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 10:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768705737
11 posts
I have completed this quest several times. There is no level cap, yes you need to be Amiable to complete it. I personaly had fun doing this quest everytime I take the boat from erudin to qeynos, and there is always a happy newbie in qeynos ready to recieve this nice piece of armor. It beats leather anyday. Well that was my 2 cp.

i got the bag with my erudite paly but then when i put some armor on him he looked like erudite with shiny wizard robe so i deleted him but first i transfered his money and stuff to my rogue. now i have the bag and all the shark stuff if i hand this in will he give me the bp?

getting the armor
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 12:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
you need to get amible for this quest. You can kill the necro at the boat to kreenen islands.Swpan time is about 6 min.good if you need armor or you want to give it to you newest charcter.After you have the right faction kill the disesed shark and it babys .The pally guild master will give you a bag ,combine it and than give it to him.good luck and enjoy:)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 12:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you need to get amible for this quest. You can kill the necro at the boat to kreenen islands.Swpan time is about 6 min.good if you need armor or you want to give it to you newest charcter.After you have the right faction kill the disesed shark and it babys .The pally guild master will give you a bag ,combine it and than give it to him.good luck and enjoy:)
Needs to be buffed a little

View User Forum

Maybe Verant should make this 11 or 10 AC and a little disease resist. But they could make the shark harder like a lv 15 or something. Im getting it anyways cause it looks awesome.

well
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2001 at 5:28 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
i like looking really cool so I'll give it a shot :)
▲ Page top
Why bother with this Verant?
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 4:16 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Look at this thing. You need to be level 10ish to complete the quest (level 9 w/ the right buffs), yet by that level you have the money to buy much better armors. heck, this thing isn't anyhting but leather armor that gives +3 fr, +3 cld, and lets face it, how much differance are dinky bonuses like that really goingto make? I recommend going for this for only 2 reasons...

It looks really cool on half or high elfs.

It's an easy 10-20pp, 30pp if you find someone who wants it for fashion.

Anyway, IMHO Verant needs to up the AC by 2-3 to make this quest really worth taking and the item worth getting, or maybe bump the saves up to +5 vs each.
▲ Page top
RE: Why bother with this Verant?
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2002 at 5:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254672679
View User Forum
Scholar
28 posts
Simple.

Because it looks good.

I don't know about you, but I'd kill for a few more item graphics in game, especially unique ones.
Actually, I'm rather fond of not having to hit level 60 so I can make VT or NToV trips to get the armor that looks fashionable.

Things like this allow lower level characters to actually tailor their appearance a little bit.

It's one of the reasons that the Shade Silk Robe is in my top ten favorite items list.
It's an ALL/ALL robe.

nothing like watching everyone ask me how my "wizard" is carrying around a sword.
▲ Page top
RE: Why bother with this Verant?
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2001 at 9:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570526995
103 posts
I can think of another great reason to do this quest no matter what level. Faction, yes the erudite necro/sk or whatever he is at the docks in Tox is great for faction too..but with this you not only get faction, but you get something in return. Nothing much but better than just faction or a few coins.
Just a thought.

Aamadanae Whirlwind
